tables.name: transcripts
tables.description: One row per transcript parsed from the input GTF.

columns.name: transcript
columns.description: Transcript ID, including version number, eg ENST00000405005.8.

columns.name: strand
columns.description: Whether strand is + or -.

columns.name: chrom
columns.description: Chromosome name, e.g. chr1.

columns.name: gene_id
columns.description: Gene ID, including version number, eg ENSG00000157168.22.

columns.name: transcript_FASTA
columns.description: The mRNA FASTA sequence for the transcript's 5' noncoding exons.

columns.name: gene_name
columns.description: Gene symbol.

columns.name: length
columns.description: Number of nucleotides in the transcript FASTA.

columns.name: utr_len
columns.description: Number of nucleotides in the transcript FASTA.

columns.name: uorf_count
columns.description: Number of uORFs identified in the 5'UTR.

tables.name: uorfs
tables.description: Upstream open reading frames identified within each 5' UTR.

columns.name: transcript
columns.description: Transcript ID, including version number, eg ENST00000405005.8.

columns.name: uorf_length
columns.description: Length of the uORF, in nucleotides.

columns.name: rel_start_pos
columns.description: The index within the 5'UTR's raw FASTA sequence where the uORF begins.

columns.name: rel_stop_pos
columns.description: The index within the 5'UTR's raw FASTA sequence where the uORF ends.

columns.name: uORF_FASTA
columns.description: The mRNA FASTA sequence of the uORF region.

columns.name: start_codon
columns.description: The start codon of the region, ie AUG.

columns.name: stop_codon
columns.description: The stop codon of the region, ie UGA. If the uORF reads into the CDS, a `NO_UTR_STOP` label is applied.

columns.name: stop_codon
columns.description: The stop codon of the region, ie UGA. If the uORF reads into the CDS, a `NO_UTR_STOP` label is applied.

columns.name: frame
columns.description: The reading frame of the uORF: 0, 1, or 2 to indicate the index of the 5'UTR FASTA sequence where the reading frame begins.

columns.name: uorf_location
columns.description: Whether the uORF is contained entirely within the 5'UTR or overlaps the CDS.

columns.name: CDS_frame_status
columns.description: Whether the uORF is in the same reading frame as the transcript's CDS start codon.

columns.name: uorf_id
columns.description: Unique ID of the uORF.

tables.name: uorfs
tables.description: Upstream open reading frames identified within each 5' UTR.

columns.name: transcript
columns.description: Transcript ID, including version number, eg ENST00000405005.8.
